title: How Dare You？
overview: Yuji Ueda, an ordinary fourth grader, is attracted to his classmate Kokoa Miyake. She is attracted to Hashimoto Haruto, a problem child. The three of them embark on somewhat radical environmental activities.

trailers.title: NYAFF24: HOW DARE YOU? | ふつうの子ども directed by Mipo O
